title: epConnection
description: This event provides details about the connection state of a device, including its metadata and protocol versions.

connectionState.description: Indicates the connection status of the device. Possible values are 'CONNECTED' or 'DISCONNECTED'.

timestamp.description: The time at which the MQTT connection event occurred, formatted as HH:MM:SS.

deviceModel.description: Specifies the model of the device involved in the MQTT connection event. Supported models are 'RFD40' and 'RFD90'.

deviceSerialNo.description: The unique serial number of the device involved in the MQTT connection event.

apiVersion.description: The version of the API in use during the MQTT connection event.

mqttVersion.description: The version of the MQTT protocol being used for the connection.
